error.signature: adb: device unauthorized. Please check the confirmation dialog on your device.
error.regex: (device unauthorized|Please check.*confirmation dialog|adb.*unauthorized|no permissions.*adb|USB debugging.*not authorized)

verdict.summary: ADB cannot communicate with device. USB debugging not enabled or RSA key not accepted on device.

dead_ends.why_fails: If the device has not authorized the computer, restarting adb will not help

dead_ends.action: Use a different USB cable assuming it is a cable issue
dead_ends.why_fails: Unauthorized error is an authentication issue, not a connectivity issue. The device IS connected.

workarounds.action: Accept USB debugging prompt on the device screen
workarounds.how: Unlock phone screen > tap 'Always allow from this computer' > OK

workarounds.action: Enable USB debugging in Developer Options
workarounds.how: Settings > About Phone > tap Build Number 7 times > Developer Options > USB debugging

workarounds.action: Revoke and re-authorize USB debugging authorizations
workarounds.how: adb kill-server && Settings > Developer Options > Revoke USB debugging authorizations > reconnect
